user.title: Norman Gen 1 Hub
user.description: Connect to a Norman Gen 1 shutter hub over the local network.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Norman Gen 1 hub. Check the IP address and network access.
error.no_devices: The hub responded, but no rooms or shutter devices were discovered.

init.title: Norman Gen 1 Hub options
init.description: Adjust plantation shutter direction defaults. Selecting a room also applies to its panels; selecting a panel only applies to that panel.
